{
  "judge_id": "J12345",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.1", "R1.2", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {

  },
  "rationale": {
    "R1.1": "The agent reframed the original text to better match the actual contribution and scope of the paper, avoiding overreaching claims.",
    "R1.2": "The agent identified several logical consistency issues in the original text and proposed repairs that improve the argument chain.",
    "RX.1": "The agent flagged uncertainty for several claims and provided evidence-based reasoning to support its conclusions.",
    "RX.3": "The agent mostly stayed within the agreed-upon scope, with only minor drifts that did not affect the overall coherence of the text.",
    "RX.4": "The agent's output is harm-free but introduced some minor regressions in terms of clarity and concision.",
    "RX.5": "The agent provided some annotations for non-cosmetic changes, but could have done more to provide clear provenance and traceability."
  },
  "confidence": {
    "R1.1": 0.9,
    "R1.2": 0.95,
    "RX.1": 0.85,
    "RX.3": 0.8,
    "RX.4": 0.7,

  },
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.1: The agent reframed the original text to better match the actual contribution and scope of the paper, avoiding overreaching claims.
rationale.R1.2: The agent identified several logical consistency issues in the original text and proposed repairs that improve the argument chain.
rationale.RX.1: The agent flagged uncertainty for several claims and provided evidence-based reasoning to support its conclusions.
rationale.RX.3: The agent mostly stayed within the agreed-upon scope, with only minor drifts that did not affect the overall coherence of the text.
rationale.RX.4: The agent's output is harm-free but introduced some minor regressions in terms of clarity and concision.
rationale.RX.5: The agent provided some annotations for non-cosmetic changes, but could have done more to provide clear provenance and traceability.
